text: Baah fuu ni na le u bui bi ke, “M bee ke nite aa ki gee maabɔr ke waah nan gee mi njan pu na; tɔ, nte Aawumbɔr bi m chee.
translated: The dog said to the goat, "I am going to the forest to look for food to eat and bring back to my children; so, wait for me, I will come back soon."

ref: And Jacob told them to be sure to say that he was right behind them. Jacob hoped the gifts would make Esau friendly, so Esau would be glad to see him when they met.
text: See ni mɔmɔk bui u ke, ‘Een, saanaagbiija Jakob le bi kɔnkɔni do ki choo na.’” Jakob nan dakl ke, “Nibaakan Esɔ yaa kan ipiin ngbaan kan, u ga li gee mi, aan ti yaa kan tɔb kan, u ga di cha pinn mi.”
translated: The man said, "Look, Esau's brother Jacob is coming and has pitched his tent with us." Jacob said, "If Esau comes to one of the groups and attacks it, the other group can escape."

ref: God gave them his blessing and said: Have a lot of children! Fill the earth with people and bring it under your control. Rule over the fish in the ocean, the birds in the sky, and every animal on the earth.
text: le ki ŋa tinyoor ŋa bi pu, le ki bui ke, “Maa, ki pɔr, aan ki gbiin kitiŋ kee pu, ki li lik kitiŋ ngbaan. Li kpa mpɔɔn ijan, ni inyoon, ni tiwan nimɔk fu ki baar kitiŋ pu na.”
translated: The child said to the mother, "Mother, I'm going, I will go to the farm and work, I will dig the farm well. The weeds have overgrown the farm, and the grass, and the trees have grown on the farm too."
